/usr/bin/g++-14 -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/lvgl-app.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/lvgl-app.dir/main.c.o" "CMakeFiles/lvgl-app.dir/lv_linux_disp_init.c.o" "CMakeFiles/lvgl-app.dir/src/ui/ui_image_balanca.c.o" "CMakeFiles/lvgl-app.dir/src/ui/ui_font_open_sans.c.o" "CMakeFiles/lvgl-app.dir/src/ui/images.c.o" "CMakeFiles/lvgl-app.dir/src/ui/screens.c.o" "CMakeFiles/lvgl-app.dir/src/ui/styles.c.o" "CMakeFiles/lvgl-app.dir/src/ui/ui.c.o" "CMakeFiles/lvgl-app.dir/src/actions.c.o" -o lvgl-app  lvgl/lib/liblvgl.a lvgl/lib/liblvgl_thorvg.a lvgl/lib/liblvgl_examples.a lvgl/lib/liblvgl_demos.a lvgl/lib/liblvgl.a lvgl/lib/liblvgl_thorvg.a lvgl/lib/liblvgl_examples.a lvgl/lib/liblvgl_demos.a
